title: Creeper AI Updated
description: Gives creepers the abitlity of see trough walls, spawn powered and explode if they cant reach you, destroying obstacles and walls.
body:
## This project is archived and will not get more updates, check [this issue](https://github.com/SrGnis/Creeper_AI_Updated/issues/24) for more information

# Minecraft is too easy
**If you are in trouble you only need to make a hole in a wall or get inside of your home and nobody can touch you.
But with this mod you should be more careful because now creepers will boom their way to you.**
---

Inspired by the work of [Funwayguy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/funwayguy/projects) in his mod [Epic Siege Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-siege-mod).

---

[Check the video!](https://youtu.be/_RVc_NBe2HU)

## Features
- Creepers will try to get as much closer to you as possible and then explode.
- Creeper explosions can cause fire.
- There is a probability of creepers spawning powered.
- Creepers can jump at you like spiders does.

## Configuration
- Probability of creepers spawning powered.
- Follow/awareness range.
- Range where creepers can decide to breach walls.
- Creeper ability to break walls.
- Creepers ability to leap at targets like spiders do.
- Creeper explosions cause fire.
- Maximum and minimum Y level where creepers can SPAWN WITH THE ABILITY of breach walls.
